body.title: Delete /review and /validate-files skills, update all callers
body.result: Deleted both skill dirs, updated 8 callers, committed.
body.description:
Delete ~/.claude/skills/review/ and ~/.claude/skills/validate-files/ — both are fully absorbed by /audit-ticket and /audit-debris respectively. Update all callers to reference the audit skills directly.

Affected files:
- ~/.claude/skills/review/ (delete)
- ~/.claude/skills/validate-files/ (delete)
- ~/.claude/skills/decided/SKILL.md (/review → /audit-ticket)
- ~/.claude/skills/fixit/SKILL.md (/review → /audit-ticket)
- ~/.claude/skills/sprint-batch/SKILL.md (/review on plan → /audit-precode)
- ~/.claude/skills/ticket/SKILL.md (/review → /audit-ticket)
- ~/.claude/skills/day-close/SKILL.md (update description)
- ~/.claude/skills/day-close-audit/SKILL.md (/validate-files → /audit-debris)
- papers/thoughts/workflow_overview.md (remove /review and /validate-files entries)

Design rules: docs-in-code (workflow_overview.md update included)
Scope boundary: in=deletion + caller updates; out=any behavior changes
Test plan: ls ~/.claude/skills/ confirms dirs gone; grep confirms no stale /review or /validate-files calls in callers
Validation: grep -r '/review\b\|validate-files' ~/.claude/skills/ --include='*.md' | grep -v 'review/\|validate-files/'
